name: Inner Peace
title: Inner Peace - Mindfulness & Mental Wellness
description: Mindfulness and mental wellness template with a calming, nature-inspired design and no framework dependencies. Features a hero section with layered floating elements and the headline 'Find Your Inner Peace' with a CTA button. The about section presents three floating info cards (Rewire Your Brain, Instant Calm, Peak Performance) with icons, plus a feature showcase with checkmark list items. The practices section displays four mindfulness practice cards with step-by-step descriptions and duration/level metadata. A resources section organizes content into guided sessions, courses, and tools categories. Contact section includes info cards and a styled form. Footer with navigation links and social icons. Uses calming blue-green gradient palette with smooth CSS transitions.

typography.style: System sans-serif with calm, readable styling. Bold headings with regular body weight. Nature-inspired color accents.

layoutDetails: Full-width hero with floating decorative elements. Three-column info cards. Four-column practice cards grid. Three-category resource grid. Two-column contact layout with form and info.
visualStyle: Calming wellness aesthetic. Light background with blue-green-sage gradient accents. Floating card animations. Soft shadows and rounded corners. Nature-inspired color palette.
